questions.question: Who was the young disciple Paul chose to accompany him from Lystra?
What happened when Paul and Silas were praying and singing in prison at midnight?
options: A great earthquake opened the doors
questions.answer: A great earthquake opened the doors

questions.question: Lydia was a seller of purple cloth and the first European convert mentioned in Acts.
They said, 'Believe on the Lord Jesus Christ, and you will be _____, you and your household.'
Paul had a vision of a man of _____ standing and begging him, saying 'Come over and help us.'
